description: Continuous integration and continuous delivery platforms for building, testing, and deploying code automatically.

entries.name: GitHub Actions
entries.summary: Workflow automation built into GitHub for CI/CD, testing, and release pipelines, with a huge marketplace of reusable actions.
entries.freeTier: 2,000 minutes/month for private repos (Linux), unlimited minutes for public repos.
entries.paidFrom: Additional minutes billed per-minute beyond included quota.

entries.name: CircleCI
entries.summary: Cloud CI/CD platform with Docker-first pipelines, parallelism, and orbs (reusable config packages).
entries.freeTier: 6,000 build minutes/month free, up to 30 concurrent jobs on free plan.

entries.name: Travis CI
entries.summary: One of the original hosted CI services, deeply integrated with GitHub for open-source and private builds.
entries.freeTier: Free tier available for open-source projects.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans from $69/month for private repos.

entries.name: AppVeyor
entries.summary: CI/CD focused on Windows and .NET projects, also supports Linux and macOS builds.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited build minutes for one concurrent job on public/open-source repos.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans from $39/month for private projects.

entries.name: Codemagic
entries.summary: CI/CD purpose-built for mobile apps (Flutter, React Native, iOS, Android) with code signing automation.
entries.paidFrom: Pay-as-you-go from $0.038/build minute beyond free quota.

entries.name: Buildkite
entries.summary: Hybrid CI/CD platform where you run your own build agents while Buildkite manages orchestration and UI.
entries.freeTier: Free for unlimited users on the open-source/small-team plan with limited pipeline minutes.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans scale with pipeline runs.

entries.name: Codefresh
entries.summary: Kubernetes-native CI/CD and GitOps platform with built-in Docker registry and pipeline visualization.
entries.freeTier: Free tier includes limited builds/month for individuals.
entries.paidFrom: Team plans from $0.75 per build credit.

entries.name: Semaphore CI
entries.summary: Fast, container-based CI/CD with generous free compute credits and a focus on pipeline speed.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with monthly compute credits (no credit card required to start).

entries.name: Drone CI
entries.summary: Container-native, self-hostable CI/CD engine configured entirely with YAML pipelines.
entries.freeTier: Fully free and open source when self-hosted.

entries.name: Jenkins
entries.summary: The most widely deployed self-hosted automation server, with an enormous plugin ecosystem covering nearly any CI/CD need.

entries.name: Render (Background Workers/CI)
entries.summary: Deploys directly from Git with built-in CI, primarily known as a PaaS but covers full build-test-deploy pipelines.
entries.freeTier: Free web services with auto-deploy from Git (services sleep after inactivity).

entries.name: CodSpeed
entries.summary: Performance regression tracking for CI pipelines, benchmarking code on every PR with consistent metrics.
